message:
feat: LISR-3/4 complete — candidate selector, proposer, validator, approval

- Minimal-diff candidate selector: risk→ops→confidence→rule_id ordering
- Conflict resolver: detect SameModulePath/SameVirtualPath, drop losers
- RepairContext bounded adapter: curated context for model proposals
- ProposalValidator: 5 checks (empty, allowed ops, risk, rule, monotonicity)
- Fail-closed approval: ApprovalRequirement for aggressive/low-confidence/3+ ops
- apply_proposal() dry-run with ApplicationResult audit record
- 31 new tests — 219 total in file

Beads: bd-k5q5.9.3.4, bd-k5q5.9.4.2, bd-k5q5.9.4.3, bd-k5q5.9.4.4
Epics: bd-k5q5.9.3, bd-k5q5.9.4 closed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
